macro_markets.query: What are the most important macroeconomic and stock market news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major index movements, Fed/central bank news, and significant company earnings or announcements.

items.title: US Stock Indexes Rise on Monday March 16
items.summary: The S&P 500 rose 1% to 6,699.38, Dow gained 0.8% to 46,946.41, and Nasdaq composite increased as markets rebounded amid ongoing macro uncertainty.

items.title: Weekly Market Decline Led by Financials and Industrials
items.summary: Global equities retreated for the week ending March 13 with Dow down 1.91%, S&P 500 down 1.56%; Financials fell 3.38% amid credit concerns, while Energy rose 2.16%.

items.title: US Trade Rep Announces Tariff Investigations on Top 16 Partners
items.summary: U.S. Trade Representative Greer launched probes into top 16 trading partners as a step toward new long-term tariffs following Supreme Court ruling on prior ones.

items.title: Q4 GDP Growth Revised Down to 0.7%, Inflation Steady
items.summary: Revised Q4 real GDP growth cut to 0.7% annualized due to weaker trade and spending; January PCE inflation at 2.8% YoY, February CPI unchanged at 2.4% YoY.

items.title: Fed Meeting and Key Data Await This Week
items.summary: Upcoming events include Fed meeting on Wednesday with Producer Price Inflation, Industrial Production today, and Jobless Claims Thursday amid Iran conflict and tariff updates.

crypto_news.query: What are the most significant cryptocurrency and blockchain news from the past 24 hours? Include major price movements, regulatory news, and notable project developments.

items.title: Bitcoin Breaks $74,000 as Fed Decision Looms
items.summary: Bitcoin surged past $74,000, marking a significant technical level that previously enabled new all-time highs. The rally comes as traders await the Federal Reserve's interest rate decision on March 18, 2026, which could significantly impact cryptocurrency markets.

items.title: Clarity Act Faces Tight Timeline for 2026 Passage
items.summary: According to Galaxy Digital's Alex Thorne, the crypto market structure legislation (Clarity Act) must pass committee by end of April and reach the Senate floor by early May, or odds of passage in 2026 become extremely low. Floor time is rapidly diminishing.

items.title: NASDAQ and ICE Partner on Tokenized Stocks Initiative
items.summary: NASDAQ and Intercontinental Exchange (parent of NYSE) are collaborating with digital asset exchanges to tokenize equities. NASDAQ is developing a framework for blockchain-based shares, partnering with Payword (parent of Kraken), with offerings launching in H1 2027.

items.title: ICE Invests in OKX at $25 Billion Valuation
items.summary: Intercontinental Exchange announced a strategic investment in crypto exchange OKX, valuing the platform at $25 billion. The deal includes plans to launch tokenized stocks and crypto futures, leveraging OKX's 120 million user base.

items.title: Bitcoin Extends Rally with Eight Consecutive Daily Green Candles
items.summary: Bitcoin achieved eight consecutive daily green candles on a closing basis, demonstrating sustained bullish momentum. Analysts note this represents significant technical strength in the current market cycle.

ai_news.query: What are the most important artificial intelligence and machine learning news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include new model releases, company announcements, research breakthroughs, and industry trends.

items.title: AI Steals the Spotlight at Embedded World 2026
items.summary: At the Embedded World 2026 conference in Nuremberg, artificial intelligence emerged as a dominant theme, with major vendors like Lattice Semiconductor, Texas Instruments, and MediaTek showcasing Edge AI capabilities integrated into microcontrollers, FPGAs, and development platforms to enable on-device machine learning.

items.title: AI-Driven Weather Forecasting Outperforms Traditional Physics-Based Models
items.summary: New AI-based weather forecasting models from companies like IBM and Google DeepMind are outperforming conventional models by up to 20% while using significantly less energy and computational resources, with the European Center for Medium-Range Weather Forecasts' AI system predicting hurricane tracks 12 hours further ahead.

items.title: World Economic Forum: AI Will Displace Workers Faster Than Reskilling Can Respond
items.summary: The World Economic Forum's latest report warns that automation will outpace human learning systems, with businesses racing to automate faster than workers can reskill, highlighting a critical skills gap in the AI era.

items.title: Agentic AI Platform Automates Entire Ad Campaign Supply Chain
items.summary: Seedtag launched a new agentic AI platform called Liz that automates media campaign planning and activation using neuro-contextual intelligence technology to identify consumer emotions and intent, with the system learning from campaign performance to optimize future campaigns.

items.title: AI Drives Ruthenium Prices to Record Highs
items.summary: Rising demand for ruthenium in modern computing applications driven by AI development has pushed ruthenium prices to unprecedented levels in 2026.

items.title: OpenClaw Incident Exposes Security Risks in Agentic AI
items.summary: The OpenClaw incident reveals hidden security and compliance risks associated with experimental agentic AI tools, raising concerns about the safety of autonomous AI systems.

gaming.query: What are the most notable video game and gaming industry news from the past 24 hours? Include game releases, announcements, esports, and industry developments.

items.title: MLB The Show 26 Releases Today
items.summary: MLB The Show 26, the latest baseball simulation, launches on March 17 with updated rosters, refined gameplay, and career-building modes ahead of the real-world season.

items.title: Everwind Enters Early Access Today
items.summary: Sandbox survival RPG Everwind launches in Early Access on PC on March 17, set in a unique world with exploration and survival elements.

items.title: RuneScape: Dragonwilds Surprise Early Access Launch
items.summary: RuneScape: Dragonwilds launches into Early Access just 15 days after announcement, expanding the RuneScape universe.

items.title: Clair Obscur: Expedition 33 Leads BAFTA 2026 Nominations
items.summary: Clair Obscur: Expedition 33 tops BAFTA Game Awards 2026 with 12 nominations, including Best Game, followed by Dispatch with nine.

items.title: GDC 2026 Highlights Industry Crisis with Layoffs, AI, and Outsourcing
items.summary: GDC 2026 shows record job seekers amid layoffs, AI tools dominating development, and rising outsourcing, signaling ongoing turmoil.

items.title: Atlus Announces Employee Salary Raises Amid Thriving Japanese Industry
items.summary: Atlus plans to increase employee salaries as the Japanese video game industry continues to thrive.

items.title: Sony Raises PS5 Price in Europe, Australia, and New Zealand
items.summary: PlayStation 5 price increases in select regions including Europe, Australia, and New Zealand, while US pricing remains unchanged.

items.title: Dune: Awakening Delayed to June
items.summary: Open-world survival game Dune: Awakening postponed to June, delaying player claims on Arrakis.

items.title: Star Wars Zero Company Turn-Based Tactics Game Announced
items.summary: Bit Reactor and Respawn announce Star Wars Zero Company, a new turn-based tactics game.

items.title: Bungie Reveals First Marathon Gameplay
items.summary: Bungie shares initial gameplay for its upcoming shooter Marathon.

tech_news.query: What are the most important technology news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major product launches, company news, and significant tech industry developments. Exclude AI-specific news.
